titles.title: When I Wear My Robe and Crown

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will tell a story on my way to glory Where I'll lay these burdens down Jesus there is waiting And friends are congregating To help me with my robe and crown

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll lay these burdens down At the blessed Savior (Savior's feet) He'll say let's look around There's so many sights to see You've fought the fight and kept the faith Come on in and settle down Now the battle's ending A new life is beginning You have won your robe and crown.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There will be no sorrow Only bright tomorrow In heaven where I'll settle down Joy bells will be ringing And all the angels singing When I receive my robe and crown.
